title: Anisopetala filicaulis

It is valued for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The bioactive constituents of Anisopetala filicaulis include alkaloids, glycosides, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. In traditional medicine, Anisopetala filicaulis is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used to make herbal teas, capsules, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
